At Kinetic7, we're pioneering a zero emissions, hydrogen-based cooking solution that addresses the pressing environmental and humanitarian challenges of our time. summary: With over two decades of leadership experience across the F&B and hospitality sectors in the MENAT region, consistently delivering results in strategic growth, brand transformation, and scalable franchise development. Achievements span a broad spectrum of concepts, from artisanal start-ups to regional rollouts of high-performing retail and restaurant brands.  Recognized for combining strategic vision with operational precision, with deep expertise in optimizing business models, enhancing unit economics, and structuring franchise systems that are both replicable and resilient. This approach balances innovation with commercial viability, ensuring each concept is aligned with market trends, operational capabilities, and consumer expectations.  A strong track record includes leading complex market entries, restructuring underperforming assets, and driving growth through data-backed strategies and high-impact execution plans, with over 110 store openings successfully delivered across multiple markets. Advisory work is grounded in cross-functional collaboration with founders, operators, investors, and international stakeholders, always with a focus on profitability, cost optimization, customer experience, and long-term brand value.  An advocate for excellence in F&B, continuously supporting business leaders in navigating competitive landscapes, scaling sustainably, and unlocking their full growth potential.

organization_description_1: BrandPortunity is a prominent hospitality consultancy in the United Arab Emirates focusing on innovation and intelligence. Since its launch in 2020, this boutique consulting has rapidly evolved its services through solid networking within the community and across the region. It has become a trusted source of hospitality management consultancy and advisory not only to investors and entrepreneurs but also to private and governmental entities looking for strategic development in the hospitality sector in general, and food in specific.  We offer solution-driven services that guide and support your hospitality businesses to grow and evolve. Our name reflects our ability to create unique “brands” and turn challenges into “opportunities” seamlessly.   BrandPortunity has over a decade of industry experience and has completed over 100 projects and store openings. Appreciation goes to our strong network across the MENAT region (UAE, KSA, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman, Jordan, Lebanon, and Turkey) and Europe notably France, Belgium, Italy Greece, and the UK. Our vast knowledge and data give us a deep understanding of consumer behavior and the latest trends in the industry.   Our team and partners come from various backgrounds in the food and beverage industry, including hoteliers, restaurateurs, financial and marketing experts, creative chefs, and architects. We prioritize building long-term relationships with our clients, providing them with accurate and strategic planning for their growth and development.   www.brandportunity.com

headline: I help organizations turn capable managers into leaders their teams actually follow.
original_headline: I help organizations turn capable managers into leaders their teams actually follow.
summary: Most leadership programs sound great on paper but in the real world, leaders don’t change through slides and theory. They change when they reflect, feel seen, and face their decisions — together. That’s why I created The Clarity Game™.  It’s not a training. It’s not a talk. It’s a gamified coaching experience that brings leadership teams into a room (virtual or physical) — and gives them space to think, question, listen, and grow. I work with HR professionals, L&D leaders, and CEOs who are done with surface-level development. They want real behavior change. They want leaders who can communicate, collaborate, and lead with clarity — not just talk about it.  What I Do: ✔ I help teams surface misalignment and build trust — fast ✔ I turn passive sessions into coaching simulations that unlock insight ✔ I guide leaders to define actions they’ll actually commit to — and track  Who It’s For: ✔ Growth-focused organizations ✔ People-first HR & L&D teams ✔ Service-based industries like tech, aviation, logistics, and beyond  Results: • A leadership team aligned around what matters • Measurable progress every 30–90 days • A culture of clarity, curiosity, and ownership If you’re building a coaching culture, or you’re tired of workshops that go nowhere — let’s talk.  Book a quick discovery call, or reach out here on LinkedIn. Let’s make clarity your competitive advantage.
position_description_1: Leading with Clarity is a podcast for managers who are ready to step into their next chapter as leaders. In each episode, I sit down with bold thinkers, seasoned executives, and rising changemakers to explore how clarity transforms leadership.  We dive deep into real stories — not just the wins, but the turning points, challenges, and mindset shifts that shaped their leadership style. From building trust to navigating uncertainty, from decision-making to inspiring teams — we unpack it all through the lens of clarity.  This podcast is for: ✅ Managers ready to grow into impactful leaders ✅ Organizations looking to build a culture of listening and alignment ✅ Individuals curious about how clarity can unlock purpose, power, and performance at work  Follow the podcast and join me in the mission to build a world where leaders don’t just manage — they lead with clarity.
position_description_2: The Clarity Game is revolutionizing workplace leadership development with a gamified approach. Our platform combines proven leadership training techniques to enhance skills, foster growth, and drive success through Coaching that is gamified.
